title: Jabba the Hutt: The Dynasty Trap
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:Jabba3.jpg]] |title=''Jabba the Hutt: The Dynasty Trap'' |writer=[[Jim Woodring]] |penciller=[[Art Wetherell]] |inker=[[Monty Sheldon]] |letterer=[[Steve Dutro]] |colorist=[[Rachelle Menashe]] |cover artist=[[Mark Harrison]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[August 1]], [[1995]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/95-073/Star-Wars-Jabba-the-Hutt---The-Dynasty-Trap|text=Star Wars: Jabba the Hutt - The Dynasty Trap}} |pages=32 |upc= |timeline=[[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]]The date of this story is established by {{DarkHorse|url=Zones/StarWars/Timeline|text=Comics Timeline}} in relation to {{Film|IV}}, which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. |series=''[[Star Wars: Jabba the Hutt]]'' |issue=3 |prev=[[Jabba the Hutt: The Hunger of Princess Nampi|''The Hunger of Princess Nampi'']] |next=[[Jabba the Hutt: Betrayal|''Betrayal'']] }} '''''Jabba the Hutt: The Dynasty Trap''''' was the third issue in the ''[[Star Wars: Jabba the Hutt]]'' series of one-shot [[Star Wars comic books|comic books]]. It was released on [[August 1]], [[1995]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Jabba has got a hot freighter on his hands and he's looking to unload it, quickly and discreetly. Enter Cabrool Nuum, a second-hand ship trader whose reputation for discretion is as long as his many years in the business. Unfortunately for Jabba, the years seem to have caught up with Cabrool, and his murderous offspring have taken advantage of the old man's dotage, just as they plan to take advantage of Jabba's impending arrival! In a seedy corner of the galaxy, on a planet of back-stabbing opportunists, Jabba the Hutt is about to land face first in ''The Dynasty Trap''!'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=Jabba the Hutt
The Dynasty Trap |text=Following his meeting with Gaar Suppoon, Jabba the Hutt and his men attempted to overtake a Nuffin freighter, only to find themselves in the massive clutches of Princess Nampi of Orooturoo. Through the loss of Jabba's second in command, Jabba defeated Nampi, and once again increased his power. Although it may prove difficult to sell the captured Nuffin freighter on the black market, Jabba is only encouraged by the possibility of even greater fortune.}} ==Plot summary== {{Plot|comic}} ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Jabba the Hutt: The Dynasty Trap}} ===Cover gallery=== File:Jabba3.jpg|Cover File:JabbaTheDynastyTrap-FC.png|Cover art ===Collected in=== *''[[Star Wars: Jabba the Hutt: The Art of the Deal]]'' *''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Wild Space Volume 2]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Vol. 4]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends: The Empire Omnibus Vol. 3]]'' ==Appearances== {{App |characters= *[[Vu Chusker]] {{1st}} *[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] *[[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] *[[Krob]] {{Mo}} *[[Lonka]] {{1st}} *[[Nampi]] {{Mo}} *[[Cabrool Nuum]] {{1st}} *[[Cabrool Nuum's wife]] {{1stm}} *[[Norba Nuum]] {{1st}} *[[Rusk Nuum]] {{1st}} *[[Quig]] {{1st}} *[[Spunto]] {{1st}} |organisms= *[[Nog (creature)|Nog]] {{Mo}} *[[Whog]] {{Mo}} |locations= *[[Smarteel]] {{1st}} |organizations= *[[House of Nuum]] {{1st}} *[[Nampi's guards]] *[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] *[[Sha (title)|Sha]] |species= *[[Cabrool Nuum's species]] {{1st}} *[[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] *[[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] *[[Nuffin]] {{Mo}} *[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] *[[Unidentified species (Nampi's guards)]] *[[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] |vehicles= *[[Minstrel-class space yacht/Legends|''Minstrel''-class space yacht]] **[[Star Jewel/Legends|''Star Jewel'']] *[[Nuffin freighter]] |technology= *[[Hoversled/Legends|Hoversled]] |miscellanea= *[[Spice/Legends|Spice]] {{Mo}} *[[Stumpweed]] {{Mo}} }} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/95-073/Star-Wars-Jabba-the-Hutt---The-Dynasty-Trap|text=Star Wars: Jabba the Hutt - The Dynasty Trap}} {{Interlang |fi=Jabba Hutt dynastian loukussa |ka=ჰატი ჯაბა: დინასტიის მახე |pl=Jabba the Hutt: The Dynasty Trap }} [[Category:Star Wars: Jabba the Hutt one-shots|03]]
